description: Lang-pack validation: `node scripts/generate-pseudo-locales.cjs && node scripts/validate-translations.cjs` passes for all 9 locales after namespace creation (covers key parity, missing/extra keys, interpolation variables, pseudo-locale patterns, Italian accents)

Namespace exists: server/public/locales/en/msp/credits.json is valid JSON with top-level groups (page, columns, status, actions, tabs, settings, charts, stats, management, reconciliation, application, expiration, expirationDialog, context)
Route config: ROUTE_NAMESPACES entry for '/msp/billing/credits' exists and includes 'msp/credits' in its namespace array
Route config: getNamespacesForRoute('/msp/billing/credits') returns array containing 'msp/credits' (longest prefix match works correctly)
Unit: CreditsPage client wrapper renders column titles (Credit ID, Created, Description, Original Amount, Remaining, Expires, Status, Actions) via t() in en
Unit: CreditsPage client wrapper renders status labels (Active, Expired, Expiring Soon) and tab labels (Active Credits, All Credits, Expired Credits) via t()
Unit: CreditsPage CreditExpirationSettings labels (Credit Expiration, Enabled/Disabled, Expiration Period, Notification Days) render via t()
Unit: CreditsPage no hardcoded English strings remain in rendered output (pseudo-locale xx coverage check)
Unit: AddCreditButton renders button label, dialog title, Cancel/Add Credit buttons via t()
Unit: AddCreditButton no hardcoded English in rendered output
Unit: BackButton renders 'Back to Credits' via t()
Unit: BackButton no hardcoded English in rendered output
Unit: CreditManagement renders page title, chart titles, stat labels, column titles via t() in en
Unit: CreditManagement chart legend labels (Credits Issued, Credits Applied, Credits Expired) rendered via t()
Unit: CreditManagement renderCreditContext labels (Lineage Missing, Recurring Source, Financial Only, Service Period) rendered via t()
Unit: CreditManagement no hardcoded English in rendered output (pseudo-locale xx coverage)
Unit: CreditReconciliation renders dashboard title, filter labels, stat card labels via t() in en
Unit: CreditReconciliation renders chart titles, column titles, tab labels, status badges via t()
Unit: CreditReconciliation toast message uses interpolation for validation result ({{balanceCount}}, {{trackingCount}})
Unit: CreditReconciliation no hardcoded English in rendered output (pseudo-locale xx coverage)
Unit: CreditApplicationUI renders card title, column titles, labels, button text via t() in en
Unit: CreditApplicationUI no hardcoded English; error/empty states translated
Unit: CreditExpirationInfo renders card title, field labels, help text via t() in en
Unit: CreditExpirationInfo description uses interpolation for applied amount ({{amount}})
Unit: CreditExpirationModificationDialog renders dialog title, field labels, switch label, button text via t() in en
Unit: CreditExpirationModificationDialog validation error ('past date') and generic error rendered via t()
Italian accent preservation: it/msp/credits.json values with accented characters (e.g., 'Crediti', 'Scadenza', 'Disponibilita') retain correct Unicode accents after generation
Variable preservation: all locale files preserve {{variable}} interpolation tokens (days, count, amount, balanceCount, trackingCount, period) identically to English source
Visual: /msp/billing/credits renders correctly in en with all strings from msp/credits namespace
Visual: credit management tab in /msp/billing renders CreditManagement and CreditReconciliation correctly in de with translated strings
Visual: xx pseudo-locale smoke test across /msp/billing/credits and credit management tab shows pseudo-text everywhere (no bare English leakage)
